Name: THINGS-EEG2: A large and rich EEG dataset for modeling human visual object recognition
Acknowledgements: We thank all 10 participants and the Cichy and Roig labs at Freie Universität Berlin and Goethe University Frankfurt.

GeneratedBy.Name: convert_thingseeg2.py (EEGDash)
GeneratedBy.Description: Converted from the THINGS-EEG2 Source EEG component (original BrainVision files + behavioural .mat) to BIDS-EEG. Source files preserved in /sourcedata/. Authors' preprocessed data preserved in /derivatives/preprocessed_eeg/ and /derivatives/resting_state/. Image stimuli stored in /stimuli/.
